I am excited.😎 😍 #include <stdio.h> //include info about standard library int main() // define a function named main that receives no // argument values. { printf("hello, world from Ox-Hugo\n"); //main calls library function printf } // to print the sequence of characters; // \n represents a newline character (message "Hello World Cup")

content: Latex Section \[ c = \pm\sqrt{a^2 + b^2} \] \[ f(x)=\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} \hat{f}(\xi) e^{2 \pi i \xi x} d \xi \] If \(a^2=b\) and \( b=2 \), then the solution must be either \[ a=+\sqrt{2} \] or \[ a=-\sqrt{2} \] \(\left(\LARGE{AB}\right)\)
title: My First Post
